children.heading: Environmental law
children.label: 1 Environmental law
children.text: The term “environmental law” has the meaning given the term in article 24.1 of the USMCA.

children.label: A
children.text: chapter 1 of the USMCA (relating to initial provisions and general definitions); and

children.label: B
children.text: chapter 24 of the USMCA (relating to environment).
